summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Potluck Planner app after Supabase to MongoDB migration. All backend APIs and frontend functionality working correctly. Both previously fixed bugs verified working.
passed_tests: All 13 backend API endpoints (100% success rate)
Home page loads with dish cards and statistics
Contribution form submission with existing dishes
Contribution form submission with new dishes
Multi-dish contribution submission (+ Add Another Dish button)
Number inputs can be cleared via backspace (no sticky '0')
Admin dashboard with all tabs (overview, participants, contributions)
Data refresh functionality on both home and admin pages
Success message display after contribution submission
CSV export functionality in admin panel
